title: IPL 2026: KKR Defeats LSG in Super Over Thriller
seoTitle: IPL 2026: KKR Defeats LSG in Super Over Thriller
seoDescription: The IPL 2026 season delivered an absolute classic last night at the Ekana Cricket Stadium in Lucknow. The **Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR)** managed to defeat...

blocks.content: The IPL 2026 season delivered an absolute classic last night at the Ekana Cricket Stadium in Lucknow. The **Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR)** managed to defeat the **Lucknow Super Giants (LSG)** in a heart-stopping Super Over finish. ### Death Bowling Masterclass After both teams tied at a mammoth 212 runs in regulation time, KKR's death bowling restricted LSG to just 9 runs in the Super Over. KKR chased it down in just four deliveries, solidifying their spot at the top of the points table.

blocks.caption: A packed house witnessed the drama unfold in Lucknow.
